# Document Templates

Reusable markdown templates for spec-driven development.

## Templates

- `PRD.md` — Product Requirements Document
- `technical-spec.md` — Feature technical spec
- `api-spec.md` — Per-endpoint spec format
- `data-model-spec.md` — Schema design spec
- `auth-spec.md` — Auth flow spec
- `architecture.md` — System architecture doc
- `deployment.md` — Deployment & infra doc
- `api-reference.md` — Full API catalog
- `CHANGELOG.md` — Versioned changelog format
